Identifying the Funnel
The Framework
IDENTIFYING THE FUNNEL
This video walks you through the actual ad campaign funnel - and how there are three
main variations of this.
As a general rule of thumb:
If client offer is below $2,000 = use a low ticket funnel
If client offer is above $2,000 = use a high ticket funnel
Download funnel templates here.
DON'T FORGET! There are full instructions on how to map this out inside the SOP!
